result.reasoning: The tool call history contains multiple steps that describe the DINOv2 model architectures. Step_1 and step_2 list the model variants: ViT-S/14 (6 heads), ViT-B/14 (12 heads), ViT-L/14 (16 heads), and ViT-g/14 (24 heads). Step_4 specifically states that the largest model is ViT-g/14 with 24 attention heads. Step_5 confirms that the biggest default transformer architecture in the original commit is ViT-g/14 and features 24 attention heads. Thus, the answer is 24. The final answer is a number, so no textual casing rule is needed.
